Video.summary: Roddy McDowell plays a filmmaker in an operating room, and meets Carol. Also: a shift with Mrs. Wiggins.
Video.title: Roddy McDowell

Video.summary: The hilarious spoof "Went With The Wind!" is presented for your entertainment. Dinah Shore guest stars.
Video.title: Dinah Shore

Video.summary: The one-of-a-kind Dom DeLuise and the sultry Peggy Lee are Carol's guests for a night of sketches and songs.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Peggy Lee, Dom Deluise

Video.summary: Guest Stars Mel Torme, Nanette Fabray, and Don Rickles pitch in to help tell "The Tin Pan Alley Story".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles

Image.alt: Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles

Video.summary: Premiere guest stars Jim Nabors! Includes Tim Conway as a soldier, and Jim dropping in on "The Family."
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Betty White plays Eunice's sister as "The Family" celebrates Mama's birthday.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Betty White

Video.summary: Kaye Ballard and Tim Conway appear on the game show spoof "The Dater's Game".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway, Kay Ballard

Video.summary: Guest Tim Conway plays a prison warden responding to a riot, and a suitor whose test reaction causes havoc.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Barrie Chase and Larry Hovis guest star! Chase provides a musical number, and Hovis plays "The Marriage Game."
Video.title: Larry Hovis, Barrie Chase

Video.summary: A meeting between incoming and outgoing First Ladies, an awkward audition, and the movie spoof "Kids Town."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Mickey Rooney

Video.summary: Ken Berry stars as a husband who is visited by the water department. Mrs. Wiggins and Mr. Tudball celebrate.
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, and David Frost join Carol for an Italian-style production of Cinderella.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost

Image.alt: Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost

Video.summary: Barbara McNair and Carol spoof a classic TV series with "I Try".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Barbara McNair, Sid Casesar

Video.summary: Among this evening's sketches: "Th Wonderful World Of Prisons", and Carol as "Mrs. Invisible Man."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Barbara Eden, Jonathan Winters

Video.summary: Joel Grey and Vincent Price play guests at a hotel where Carol is the switchboard operator.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Joel Grey, Vincent Price

Video.summary: Cass Elliot and Pat Paulsen star. Pat looks at "How To Be A Sensuous Female" and Cass joins 10th Avenue.
Video.title: Cass Elliot, Pat Paulsen

Video.summary: Harvey and Tim are tipsy friends coming home from a night of carousing, plus a spoof of The Arabian Nights.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jane Connell, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Features Harvey as a man faking whiplash. On "The Family", Mama, Ed, and Eunice are invited to Mickey's place.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Imogene Coca joins Carol, while Harvey and Carol interview with Miss America and the parody "Bonnie And Clod."
Video.title: Imogene Coca

Video.summary: Guests Art Carney and Nanette Fabray appear in "Guess What's Coming To Dinner?" and "Passion On 10th Avenue."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Art Carney

Video.summary: Guest Robert Goulet joins Q&A. Sketches include the aftermath of a party, and a maid entranced by a star.
Video.title: Robert Goulet

Video.summary: Michele Lee and Flip Wilson dazzle with song and stand-up comedy, and Carol vamps in "V.I.P." as Mae East.
Video.title: Michele Lee, Flip Wilson

Video.summary: Bing Crosby and Rowan Martin guest! Bing's sketch is set in Brown Derby, while the "Laugh-In" boys are crooks.
Video.title: Bing Crosby, Rowan & Martin

Video.summary: Poetically-named guest stars Martha Raye and Tim Conway come to play.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Martha Raye, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Mama, Eunice, and Ed return from an inspiring Sunday sermon.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Invisible dogs run amok in an obedience class, while insurance agent Carol pesters doctor Tim.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Jerry Lewis guests as an awkward groom set up for a society marriage. Also: another day with "The Old Folks."
Video.title: Jerry Lewis

Video.summary: Anthony Newley & Dick Martin appear in a tribute to movie detectives, and Carol & Vicki are ready to mingle.
Video.title: Anthony Newley, Dick Martin

Video.summary: Funt & Mundane score a hit, leading to a performance. Also: Tim's "Oldest Man" character is completely at sea.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Dyan Cannon & Paul Lynde star. Lynde plays an insurance salesman, and Cannon is on "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Dyan Cannon, Paul Lynde

Video.summary: Jim Nabors returns for his final season premiere! Also, new member Dick Van Dyke joins Tim for a pantomime.
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Steve Martin & Betty White catch a wave in the spoof "Beach Blanket Boo-Boo!". Also: Carol plays a bag lady.
Video.title: Steve Martin, Betty White

Video.summary: When Mama and The Family play Charades, things turn to chaos. Also: a despondent bar patron meets her match.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters and Cass Elliot guest star in "As The Stomach Turns", and Lyle causes havoc and absurdity.
Video.title: Bernadette Peters, Cass Elliot
